What's inside

Everything you actually need.
Nothing you don't.

Built for real people with real busy lives. No steep learning curve, no overwhelm, just clarity.

🎯Live
Smart Priority System

P0, P1, P2 so you always know what to do first. P0 critical tasks get auto-reminders and a bold red accent. Tasks group by priority on both Home and Listing screens.

P0 CriticalAuto-reminded
P1 ImportantDo today
P2 NormalWhen you can
⚡Live
Quick Task Creation

Add tasks straight from the home screen's inline bar. Tap +, type a title, pick a priority, theme, and date. Done in under 5 seconds. No buried menus anywhere.

+ Add a new task... P0 🏷 📅
Period · Theme · Status · Priority · Sort
🔁Live
Task Recurrence

Create once, repeat forever. Set daily, weekly, monthly, or yearly with optional instance count or end date. All future tasks are auto-generated from one single tap.

DailyWeeklyMonthlyYearly
Set number of instances or an end date. Default is 10 tasks.
👆Live
Swipe to Act

Right swipe to complete. Left swipe to delete. The fastest way to manage your list. No buttons, no menus, just gesture control. Deleted tasks go to the Recycle Bin so nothing is lost by accident.

Swipe right Mark complete ✓
Swipe left Move to Recycle Bin
🔍Live
Smart Filters

Slice your task list exactly how you need it. Filter by time period, theme, status, and priority all at once. Sort by priority or date. Works on both Home and Listing screens.

Period
AllTodayWeekMonthCustom
Status + Priority
ActiveDoneArchivedP0P1P2
Sort by Priority or Date · combines with any filter
🎨Live
Custom Themes

Build your own categories. Work, Health, Home, Projects, Learning, anything. Each theme card shows total tasks, pending count, and a colour-coded progress bar.

💼 Work 📚 Learning 🏠 Home + Create yours
👥Live
Team Up

Assign tasks to family, friends, and colleagues. Track progress together from one place.

F
Family
Book the doctor appointment
Pending
C
Colleague
Send the project proposal
Done ✓
⭐Live
Daily Stars System

Gamified motivation that actually works. Earn up to 5 stars based on daily task completion rate. Watch the progress bar fill as you check things off.

⭐⭐⭐
30%
⭐⭐⭐⭐
70%
⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐
100%
🔔Live
Smart Notifications

Auto P0 critical alerts so nothing urgent slips. Morning daily summary to start focused. Quiet hours protect your deep work time. Configure everything in Settings.

📊Live
Live Dashboard

Your command center on Home and Listing tabs. See total, pending, done, and archived counts with a live completion bar. Weekly calendar strip shows task indicators per day. Collapsible. Greets you by name every morning.

✅Live
Done Tab

Every completed task lives here with theme labels, dates, and a one-tap restore button. Your personal log of wins. Search through past completions. A reminder of how much you actually get done.

📤Live
Data Export and Import

Your data is 100% yours. Export your full task history from Settings anytime. Import it back to restore or migrate. Recycle Bin holds deleted tasks as a safety net so nothing is lost permanently by mistake.

How it works

Three steps. That's it.

No complex onboarding. Open the app, get going, win your day.

1

Dump it all in

Add every task in seconds from the home screen quick-add bar. Set a theme, priority, dates, and recurrence. Get the mental clutter out. Toodle holds it all.

2

Toodle organises it

Tasks auto-sort by priority. P0 items surface with alerts. Smart filters show exactly what matters today. Assign tasks to family, friends, or colleagues with one tap.

3

Swipe, earn stars, repeat

Swipe right to complete. Watch your progress bar fill. Earn 5 stars. End the day opening the Done tab as proof you got things done.
